specific_question: Why did the KM team at Lee's Market decide to overhaul the warehouse operations processes at Montreal's local stock and inventory center in October 2024?
answer: After major disruptions in the store restocking and inventory management operations at Montreal's warehouse in October 2024, the KM team decided to completely remodel the warehouse operations procedures and introduce new SOPs.
